nasb.text: “Behold, we are going up to Jerusalem; and the Son of Man will be delivered to the chief priests and scribes, and they will condemn Him to death,

esv.text: “See, we are going up to Jerusalem. And the Son of Man will be delivered over to the chief priests and scribes, and they will condemn him to death

cnv.text: “我們現在上耶路撒冷去，人子要被交給祭司長和經學家，他們要定他死罪，

ccb.text: “你们要留意，我们现在前往耶路撒冷，人子将被交给祭司长和律法教师。他们要判祂死刑，

csbs.text: “看，我们现在上耶路撒冷去，人子将被出卖给祭司长们和经文士们。他们要定他死罪，
